shared_properties: Primary painted tone uses #535353 with #F7F7F7 fill and optional #FF0000 accent flash.
Panel footprint stays compact inside the top-right HUD zone.
Text content aligns to a five-digit score readout.
differences: This task defines the frame, separators, and flash mask for the live score readout.
The right edge sits 10 px from the camera border and the top edge sits 10 px from the camera border.
A milestone flash mask can switch to #FF0000 for 0.1 seconds at 100-point intervals.

reference_images.label: gameplay_capture
reference_images.purpose: Gameplay frame for HUD anchoring, sky-ground composition, and runner lane spacing.

reference_images.label: offline_sprite_1x
reference_images.purpose: 1x pixel atlas for dinosaur, cactus, pterodactyl, digits, and ground proportions.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load one 60x18 PNG during Loading state and place it under the score digit sprites in the HUD root.
runtime_notes: Anchor the panel so its right edge sits 10 px from the camera boundary.
Toggle the flash tint for 0.1 seconds when score modulo 100 equals zero.
Keep the panel on a HUD render layer independent from world parallax.

context.usage: Frames the current score and high-score readouts at the top-right corner.

shape_notes: Outer border thickness stays at 1 px.
Flash mask covers the full 60x18 px panel.
No corner radius or diagonal bevel appears on the border.

acceptance_criteria: Canvas is exactly 60x18 px with one 1 px border around the readout area.
Current score region fits five 10x16 digit cells without overlap.
Any #FF0000 pixel is reserved for the milestone flash mask only.
